description: Determines features for city map tiles. Roll 1d12 for each tile.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines features for city map tiles. Roll 1d12 for each tile.

entries.result: Route: Anything that facilitates important travel, such as major roads, bridges, rivers, orbital beanstalk stations, airports, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Route: Anything that facilitates important travel, such as major roads, bridges, rivers, orbital beanstalk stations, airports, etc.

entries.result: Residential: Places where City residents live, such as houses, apartment buildings, tents, caves, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Residential: Places where City residents live, such as houses, apartment buildings, tents, caves, etc.

entries.result: Commerce: Areas that are connected to commerce, such as marketplaces, factories, farms, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Commerce: Areas that are connected to commerce, such as marketplaces, factories, farms, etc.

entries.result: Infrastructure: Services and institutions that help a City function, such as hospitals, schools, courts, power stations, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Infrastructure: Services and institutions that help a City function, such as hospitals, schools, courts, power stations, etc.

entries.result: Natural: This is something natural that the City hasn't displaced, such as hills, lakes, rivers, the bleached bones of an ancient leviathan, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Natural: This is something natural that the City hasn't displaced, such as hills, lakes, rivers, the bleached bones of an ancient leviathan, etc.

entries.result: Happy: These are areas and buildings that make residents feel happy, content, safe, and connected, such as museums, parks, temples, etc.

resultTranslations.en: Happy: These are areas and buildings that make residents feel happy, content, safe, and connected, such as museums, parks, temples, etc.

entries.result: Sprawl: This City Feature is the same as another adjoining (horizontally, vertically, or diagonally) tile. If this is the map's first Feature, then treat this roll as Infrastructure

resultTranslations.en: Sprawl: This City Feature is the same as another adjoining (horizontally, vertically, or diagonally) tile. If this is the map's first Feature, then treat this roll as Infrastructure
